=== Woo OTEC Moodle ===
Contributors: jcares
Tags: moodle, woocommerce, lms, courses, enrollment
Requires at least: 6.4
Tested up to: 6.9
Requires PHP: 8.1
Stable tag: 2.1.20
License: GPLv2 or later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html

Professional Moodle and WooCommerce integration for course sync, enrollment automation, and learner access management.

== Description ==

Woo OTEC Moodle connects Moodle and WooCommerce so you can sync courses, enroll customers automatically after purchase, and manage learner access from a single workflow.

Main features:

* Moodle connection by URL and token.
* Course and category synchronization into WooCommerce products.
* Existing course matching and update flow.
* Automatic enrollment after WooCommerce order processing.
* Customizable email and storefront appearance controls.
* Configuration export and import for faster deployments.

== Installation ==

1. Upload the `woo-otec-moodle` folder to `/wp-content/plugins/`.
2. Activate the plugin through the `Plugins` screen in WordPress.
3. Go to `Woo OTEC Moodle` in the WordPress admin menu.
4. Configure your Moodle connection and plugin settings.

== Frequently Asked Questions ==

= Does this plugin require WooCommerce? =

Yes. WooCommerce must be installed and active.

= Does this plugin require Moodle web services? =

Yes. You need a Moodle site with web services enabled and a valid token.

= Can I move the same setup to another site? =

Yes. The plugin can export and import its configuration to speed up new installations.

== Changelog ==

= 2.1.0 =

* Improved sync flow for existing courses.
* Added configuration export and import.
* Refined admin UI and appearance controls.
* Improved course image and metadata handling.
